column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]

Since 2008, we’ve journeyed across Europe to bring a range of quality and delicious European bakery products to your table. Our aim is to cherish food traditions from these amazing places and inspire you to make them your own. From Belgian Waffles to French Croissants, stone-baked Italian Pizza Bases, Brioche, Macarons and more, we guarantee to transport you, even just for a small moment, to those far away places.

Bon Appetit!

yoast_head_json.description: At Toscano, we believe food has the power to bring people together. Every shared plate, every laugh, every story told between bites, these are the real ingredients of life.
